text: Repository for persistence-aware memory and emergent structure experiments. Treats memory as a governed influence layer rather than simple storage.
Repository related to error-catastrophe simulations. Useful for separability and failure-mode experiments, but not directly a software implementation.
Always retrieve the top-k most similar memories and use them immediately. This is an outdated baseline because relevance alone does not imply current usefulness or safety.
Matched synthetic tests showed persistence-aware v2 beat ordinary retrieval on net utility across tested matched worlds, but did not always beat no-memory under safety-heavy scoring.
Compression did not activate reliably in the current experiments and should not be treated as a supported mechanism yet.
